title: Enlarge 'Join Now For Tournament' text, resize animated boy, and shrink boards

requirements.summary: Enlarge and bold the 'Join Now For Tournament' button text to make the call-to-action more prominent
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Join Now For Tournament' span text is visibly larger and bolder than before.
The button still renders correctly on mobile and desktop without overflow or layout breakage.

file_operations.description: Locate the 'Join Now For Tournament' button text element (matching XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]/span[4]) and increase its font size by at least one to two Tailwind size steps (e.g., from text-base to text-lg or text-xl) and apply a heavier font weight class (e.g., font-bold or font-extrabold). Ensure the parent button container can accommodate the larger text without overflow on mobile viewports.

requirements.summary: Reduce the size of the animated shooting boy character in HeroSection while preserving all animations
acceptanceCriteria: The animated boy character is visibly smaller than the current version.
All CSS keyframe animations (shooting, firing) continue to play correctly on the smaller character.
The hero layout remains balanced and the character does not overlap other elements.

file_operations.description: Scale down the animated shooting boy SVG element by reducing its width and height attributes or applying a CSS transform scale. Adjust the SVG dimensions (e.g., reduce from current size by 20-30%) or apply a scale transform (e.g., scale(0.7)) to the boy's container. Verify that the shooting and firing CSS keyframe animations defined in the component still apply correctly to the resized element without visual artifacts.

requirements.summary: Shrink the target board(s) in the HeroSection shooting animation scene
acceptanceCriteria: The target board(s) are visibly smaller than the current version.
The shooting animation still targets the board correctly after the resize.
No visual artifacts or misalignment in the hero scene after scaling down the board.

file_operations.description: Locate the target board SVG element(s) in the shooting animation scene and reduce their width and height attributes. Scale down the board dimensions (e.g., reduce by 20-30% from current size) while ensuring the animated projectile still visually aligns with the board target. Test that the overall hero composition remains balanced after the board resize.
